name_en: 【Overseas Exclusive】M12099 Black, Small. 🔥 Double-sided. This legendary Neverfull BB handbag always meets your tote needs. Spacious yet not bulky, structured yet soft, suitable for home or travel. Tighten the side drawstrings to instantly transform into a stylish city tote. Loosen the drawstrings to revert to a chic and practical handbag. The long leather handle is suitable for shoulder or arm carry. The version shown is made of Damier Azur canvas.

Size: 24x19x9cm
